request_payload.exposure_text: I get it - we all want to be welcoming. But have you noticed how some communities are struggling to maintain their identity when new arrivals don't integrate? My neighborhood used to have that small-town feel, but now it's like we're all just passing through. We need to encourage people to adopt our values if we want to keep our communities strong. It's not about being unwelcoming - it's about preserving what makes our neighborhoods special. #CommunityValues #SharedIdentity
